name: com.likeon.gas.movement
description: Movement & locomotion companion for Sigil (com.likeon.gas). A GameplayTag-driven movement state machine on a CharacterController, mirrored to the ability system, plus a data-driven locomotion animation layer (in-air state, view-relative aim offset, core-state tags -> Animator) and a sample layered Animator Controller generator. Depends on the Sigil core package. Independent Unity implementation; single-player authoritative.

samples.description: Walk around with WASD + mouse look on a third-person character — input flows through the GAS input system (InputProcessor_Move / InputProcessor_Look). Ships a ready-baked scene + player prefab: open MovementDemo.unity and press Play. (Re-bake via 'Likeon ▸ GAS ▸ Samples ▸ Build Movement Demo Scene'.)
